name: WFBE_NEURODEF_ARTYPOS_LIGHT_WEST
notes: ARTILLERY PIT (LIGHT, 1 AI) — WEST. A single M119 howitzer in a proper earthen artillery revetment (Land_fort_artillery_nest_EP1) that hides the gun from ground observation and eats counter-battery shrapnel, while leaving the sky wide open for high-angle fire (NOTHING overhead). Soldier logic: a lone gun is a free kill without local protection, so a rear .50 picket watches the back door and the ammo dump sits BEHIND cover to the rear (a cook-off must not take the gun with it). Bag-fence horseshoe closes the flanks; the front stays open for the tube; the rear-left is the crew's covered entrance. The gun tube points +Y (firing arc away from base).

objs.role: earthen artillery revetment — hides gun, clear overhead
howitzer — high-angle fire, tube +Y, NO overhead cover
rear MG picket — covers the back door
forward wire — keeps dismounts off the muzzle
